record.field: Welcome to Zeeve’s {{ (ctx.get('rollup_subscription_ctx') or {}).get('protocol_name') or object.type_id.name or 'Rollup' }} Rollup – Your Subscription Details

Hi ,

Thank you for choosing Zeeve to power your Rollup!

We’re excited to support your journey in building scalable, efficient, and secure rollups.

Below are the details of your subscription:

Subscription Details:

●

Plan Type:

●

Protocol: Rollup

●

Network ID:

●

Subscription Period: to

●

Next Renewal Date:

Rollup Status:

●

Current Status:

●

ETA:

Next Steps & Resources:

●

Manage Your Rollup: Access your Zeeve dashboard to monitor and configure your rollup.
👉 Zeeve Dashboard

●

Developer Documentation: Get all the technical insights and guides you need.
👉 Docs

●

Need Help? Our team is here for you. Reach out anytime at or schedule a call for assistance.
👉 Talk to an Expert

We appreciate your trust in Zeeve, and we look forward to helping you scale your rollup with ease.

Best regards,


Zeeve Team

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved

Your Rollup is ready: {{ (ctx.get('rollup_subscription_ctx') or {}).get('protocol_name') or object.type_id.name or 'Rollup' }} L3 - {{ (ctx.get('rollup_subscription_ctx') or {}).get('environment_name') or (ctx.get('rollup_subscription_ctx') or {}).get('network_name') or object.service_id or 'Testnet' }}

Hi ,

Thank you for choosing Zeeve to power your Rollup.

Your L3 Rollup is up and running. You can now deploy smart contracts, dApps, and manage your network.

Subscription Details:

●

Network ID:

●

Subscription Period: to

●

Next Renewal Date:

Rollup Status:

●

Current Status: Ready

Next Steps & Resources:

●

Manage Your Rollup: Access your Zeeve dashboard to monitor and configure your rollup.
👉 Zeeve Dashboard

●

Developer Documentation: Get all the technical insights and guides you need.
👉 Docs

●

Need Help? Our team is here for you. Reach out anytime at or schedule a call for assistance.
👉 Talk to an Expert

We appreciate your trust in Zeeve, and we look forward to helping you scale your rollup with ease.

Best regards,


Zeeve Team

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved
New Rollup subscription created: {{ (ctx.get('rollup_subscription_ctx') or {}).get('service_name') or object.name }}

New rollup subscription confirmed

A new rollup subscription has been activated and requires provisioning oversight.

Subscription Summary:

●

Service:

●

Protocol: Rollup

●

Plan:

●

Network ID:

●

Subscription Period: to

●

Next Renewal Date:

●

Stripe Subscription:

●

Provisioning ETA:

Customer:

●

Name:

●

Company:

●

Email:

Review the service record in Odoo to coordinate provisioning tasks and ensure onboarding communication is aligned.

— Rollup Operations

Follow us at

@ 2025 Zeeve. All Rights Reserved
Reminder: Your Rollup payment is due in {{ ctx.get('days_to_due', 0) }} days

Hi ,

This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will be renewed in just day(s),on . To ensure uninterrupted access to all the benefits and features of your subscription, please make sure your payment is processed before the due date.

Key Details

●

Service:

●

Due date:

●

Amount:

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us at .

Thank you for being a valued customer!.

Best Regards,
The Zeeve Team

Follow us at

© . All rights reserved.
Action required: Your Rollup payment is overdue

Immediate action required

Hi ,

This is a friendly reminder that today is the due date for your subscription payment. To continue enjoying , please complete your payment by the end of the day.

Account Summary

●

Service:

●

Amount:

●

Due Date:

Pay Outstanding Invoice

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out to us at .

Thank you for being a valued customer!.

Best Regards,
The Zeeve Team

Follow us at

© . All rights reserved.
Your Rollup subscription is now suspended

Access suspended for

Hi , your rollup has been temporarily disabled because we have not received payment due on .

How to restore service

●

Pay the outstanding invoice using the button below.

●

Once Stripe confirms the payment we will automatically reactivate the deployment.

●

If you need more time or a custom plan, contact our team and we will work with you.
Pay and Reactivate

Need urgent assistance? Email and we will respond promptly.

Regards,
The Zeeve Team
Action needed: Stripe could not renew {{ object.name }}

Payment failed for

Hi , our attempt to renew your Rollup on did not go through. The message from Stripe was: .

What to do next

●

Open the Stripe invoice and retry the payment or update your card details.

●

Confirm sufficient funds or contact your bank to allow the charge.

●

If you need help or more time, reply to this email and our team will assist.
Review invoice & pay

Your rollup remains active, but please resolve the payment before to avoid suspension.

Questions? Reach us at and we will be happy to help.

Regards,
The Zeeve Team
Immediate attention: payment failed for {{ object.name }}

Payment failed for

Stripe could not capture the scheduled renewal for . Please coordinate with the customer to resolve the billing blocker and avoid service interruption.

Failure Snapshot

●

Customer:

●

Plan:

●

Amount due:

●

Due date:

●

Invoice:

●

Stripe error:

Open hosted invoice

Please reach out to the customer or update their billing profile to prevent automatic suspension if the payment remains unpaid.

Need assistance? Email .

Regards,
The Zeeve Billing Team
{{ ctx.get('payment_category_label') or 'Subscription Payment' }} - Rollup payment received for {{ object.name }}

Hello Zeeve Team,

A payment has been captured for . The subscription is now in good standing and provisioning has been triggered for the customer.

Customer:

Payment Snapshot

●

Invoice:

●

Amount:

●

Payment reference:

●

Next billing date:

●

Payment type:

Review Invoice in Odoo

Please ensure provisioning continues smoothly. Reach out to the customer if additional deployment confirmation is required.

Need to escalate? Email for immediate assistance.

Thanks,
The Zeeve Billing Team

Cancelled Subscription - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('Plan_Name')) or ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('plan_name')) or (object.type_id.name or 'Rollup Subscription') }}

Zeeve Subscription Cancelled Template

Subscription Cancelled

Dear ,
Your subscription for has now been cancelled. We hope this email finds you well. We are reaching out to confirm that we have received your recent request to cancel your subscription to the . As per your request, your subscription has been successfully cancelled, effective immediately. This means that you will no longer have access to the features and benefits associated with this plan.

As promised, here are the details of your subscription:
Subscription ID:
Monthly Subscription Cost:  
Date of Cancellation:
Status:

We value your feedback and would greatly appreciate it if you could spare a few moments to share your reasons for cancelling your subscription. Your insights will aid us in improving our services and meeting the needs of our customers more effectively. You can share your feedback by replying to this email or by visiting our website's feedback page at Zeeve.

If you have any questions or concerns about your subscription, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
Zeeve Inc, 395 Santa Monica, Pl Unit 308, Santa Monica, CA 90401, United States
|

Cancelled Subscription By - {{ ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('buyer_email_id')) or ((ctx.get('planDetails') or ctx.get('plan_details') or {}).get('buyerEmail')) or (object.customer_id.email or 'Customer') }}

Subscription Cancelled

Dear Admin,
We hope this email finds you well. We regret to inform you that the subscription for by user has been cancelled.

Here are the details of the subscription:
User email:
Subscription ID:
Monthly Subscription Cost:  
Date of Cancellation:
Status:

We understand that this may come as a disappointment, and we would appreciate it if you could update the user's account status accordingly.
Thank you for your understanding and cooperation throughout this process. We greatly appreciate your continued support.

If you have any questions or concerns about your subscription, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. Our customer support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
Zeeve Inc, 395 Santa Monica, Pl Unit 308, Santa Monica, CA 90401, United States
|
